data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-0acd1f8ab1a14955942ce83db3850646 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | head -60", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All 5 Integration-category tests passed. The command is:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` syntax where `Category=Integration` matches xUnit's `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]` attribute.
